channel.title: Operations on OpsAI Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Operations on OpsAI Tools

item.title: AI Tools for Logistics Operations: What Actually Works in 2026
item.description:
AI Tools for Logistics Operations: What Actually Works in 2026

AI tools for logistics operations are everywhere. Every SaaS vendor has slapped “AI-powered” on their homepage. Half of them mean they added a chatbot. The other half mean they run basic statistical models and call it machine learning.

This guide cuts through the noise. After 10+ years in supply chain operations — managing everything from FMCG distribution to pharmaceutical logistics — I’ve seen which AI tools actually change how logistics teams work, and which ones are expensive screensavers.

item.title: Best Automated Inventory Management Software in 2026
item.description:
Best Automated Inventory Management Software in 2026

Automated inventory management software is no longer optional. If you’re still running inventory counts on spreadsheets, manually entering purchase orders, or guessing reorder points based on last quarter’s numbers — you’re bleeding money. Period.

The right automated inventory management software eliminates human error, cuts carrying costs by 20-35%, and gives you real-time visibility across every warehouse, channel, and SKU. The wrong one creates more problems than it solves.
